mapper.select: SELECT restaurant_id, name, address, phone, category, rating, open_time, close_time FROM MODEL_RESTAURANT WHERE restaurant_id = #{restaurantId}
SELECT restaurant_id, name, address, phone, category, rating, open_time, close_time FROM MODEL_RESTAURANT WHERE name LIKE '%' || #{name} || '%' ORDER BY name FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY
SELECT restaurant_id, name, address, phone, category, rating, open_time, close_time FROM MODEL_RESTAURANT WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY rating DESC FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY
